jktekxZ ij izos’k djokus ds fy, fu;e 4 ds mi&fu;e ¼2½ ds v/khu 'kqYd laxzg.k ,tsalh -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] dks] ;kaf=d okguksa dh ,slh Js.kh ds fy, ykxw 'kqYd ds nl xquk ds cjkcj] 'kqYd dk Hkqxrku djuk gksxkA [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@433@lhvks@08&09@thlh@y[kuÅ] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th November, 2014 S.O. 2909(E).— Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways Fee (collection of fees by any person for user of Section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary bridge on National Highways) Rules, 1997, Central Government, vide notification S.O. 1422 (E) dated 20.06.2011 authorized M/s. Lucknow Sitapur Expressway Limited to collect and retain the fee for the development, operation and maintenance of the stretch from km. 488.270 to km 413.200 (Lucknow - Sitapur section) of NH-24 in the state of Uttar Pradesh to four lane divided carriageway on Build, Operate and Transfer (BOT) basis. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and its Amendment Rules, 2013 published vide G.S.R. 778 (E) dated 16.12.2013 and Ministry of Road Transport and Highways Office Memorandum bearing File No. H-39011/12/2014- Toll dated 13.03.2014, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification published vide S.O. 1422 (E) dated 20.06.2011. 1. WPI-B in note 2 of Para-2 the Notification shall be substituted as follows: “WPI-B = is the Average Wholesale Price Index for the year ending March 31st preceding the fee revision date” 2. A mechanical vehicle which is loaded in excess of permissible load specified for its category under sub-rule (2) of rule 4, shall not be permitted to use the National Highway or crossing the toll plaza until the excess load has been removed from such mechanical vehicle. The driver or owner or a person in charge of a mechanical vehicle shall be liable to pay fee, for entering the overloaded vehicle on the National Highway to the toll collecting agency, equal to ten times of the fee applicable to such category of mechanical vehicle under sub-rule (2) of Rule 4. [F. No. NHAI/13013/433/CO/08-09/GC/Lucknow] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy.
